description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a formal ensemble, featuring a tailored jacket with ornate embroidery on the sleeves and lower legs, a matching vest, and fitted trousers. The jacket is complemented by a tie and a pocket square, adding to the sophisticated appearance. The figure wears glasses and has neatly styled short hair, giving a polished and professional look. The shoes are formal and coordinated with the outfit, while the overall posture is upright and confident. The facial features are well-defined, and the hands are relaxed at the sides. The attire and accessories suggest the figure is prepared for a formal or ceremonial urban event.
description: A formally dressed adult male figure in a tailored suit with ornate embroidery, glasses, and formal shoes, standing upright.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the embroidered jacket, fitted trousers, and formal shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, glasses, and the detailed embroidery on the jacket sleeve and trouser leg.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full suit ensemble, tie, pocket square, glasses, and facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, glasses, and ornate sleeve and trouser embroidery.
attribute_clothing_type: formal suit with tailored jacket, vest, tie, fitted trousers, and pocket square
